Prophetic & Apostolic Ministry · Global Reach

A People of
Becoming.

Hayah — from the Hebrew הָיָה — means to be, to exist, to become, and to come into manifestation. We are raised as a Divine commission to embody this reality: where what God speaks must not remain in the realm of prophecy — it must become.

Our Mission & Vision Learn Our Story
10+
Years of ministry
3
Nations reached
7+
Books published
Our Foundation

Mission & Vision

The twin pillars that anchor everything we do as a prophetic and apostolic expression of God's Kingdom.

M
Mission Statement

Mobilizing the Global Church into Christ-Centred Unity

To awaken and mobilize the global Church into Christ-centered unity, sacrificial love, and the full expression of the dominion mandate; fostering spiritual maturity, Kingdom authority, and all-round prosperity — spiritually, physically, and socially — until the Body of Christ attains the fullness of Christ.

John 17:20–23 · Genesis 1:26–31 · Ephesians 4:13

V
Vision Statement

Advancing the Great Commission with Power

To advance the Great Commission by proclaiming the Gospel of Jesus Christ with power, bringing holistic deliverance to individuals and communities, awakening global consciousness to the imminent return of our Lord Jesus Christ, and equipping believers to live in readiness, purity, and spiritual authority.

Mark 16:15–16 · Matthew 28:18–20

2025
Ottawa Worship Experience
Ministry Introduction

Raised as a Divine Commission

HAYAH is a prophetic expression drawn from the Hebrew word הָיָה, meaning "to be, to exist, to become, and to come into manifestation." Revealing God as the One who not only is, but who causes things to be.

From Genesis to Exodus 3:14, where God reveals Himself as "I AM" — the Self-Existent One and the God of manifestation — Hayah International Ministries is raised to embody and proclaim this reality.

✦
Awaken Identity
Bringing men into the revelation of who they are in Christ.
♦
Facilitate Transformation
Moving lives from potential into Divine manifestation.
◈
Establish God's Purposes
Seeing His will become reality in individuals, families, and territories.
❋
Demonstrate God's Word
Where what is spoken by God becomes tangible and evident.

September 20, 2025

The Great Awakening Worship Experience

A global worship convergence organised by Hayah Ministries International, Ottawa. Expect God's mighty power through healing, deliverance, and extraordinary breakthrough.

Tony Graham Recreation Complex, 100 Charlie Rogers, Kanata, ON

Recurring
Monthly · Ottawa & Online

Knee-Force Prayer Gathering

Monthly intercessory prayer meetings for the body of Christ — in person and online. All are welcome.

A movement of Divine manifestation — called to reveal the reality of God in our generation. When God speaks, it must HAYAH.
